3325920.name: Blitzthera
3325920.description:
Blitzthera is a fast-paced, stylized multiplayer first-person shooter that delivers large-scale, action-packed battles in a vibrant low-poly world. Built for players who love intense firefights and dynamic team play, Blitzthera combines classic FPS mechanics with unique class-based combat to create a fresh and energetic experience.

Choose from distinct classes — Soldier, Heavy, Medic, Engineer, and Sniper — each offering different weapons, abilities, and strategies. Whether you’re charging into the frontlines, supporting teammates with heals, or holding ground with heavy firepower, every role makes a difference on the battlefield.

Early Access includes:

  • Multiple maps designed for fast-paced and tactical encounters

  • A variety of weapons and loadouts to test different playstyles

  • Several game modes that encourage both teamwork and solo skill

  • A stylized low-poly art style that keeps the action visually striking and easy to read

  • Core class system that lays the foundation for future expansion

Blitzthera is being developed with the community in mind. Player feedback will directly shape new maps, weapons, and balance updates as the game grows. Our goal is to refine and expand Blitzthera into a competitive yet accessible shooter that feels great to pick up but rewards teamwork, creativity, and skill.
